headline: GameStop's eBay Pursuit Faces Doubts
summary: Cohen still has several options, but none appear easy after eBay's rejection.

raw.headline: GameStop's eBay Pursuit Faces Doubts
raw.summary: Cohen still has several options, but none appear easy after eBay's rejection.

headline: Analysis-Wall Street awaits GameStop CEO Cohen's next move after eBay rejected takeover bid
summary: GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen shared few details when he said he would do "whatever we need to do" to buy eBay after the e-commerce company rejected his $56 billion unsolicited takeover bid as "neither credible nor attractive."  In early May, Cohen offered eBay's board $125 a share as well as his services as CEO.  Half the offer was in cash and half in stock, with the cash portion ‌coming from GameStop's $9.4 billion in cash reserves.

headline: Amazon starts selling its AI shopping technology to other retailers
summary: Amazon said it's already signed up Kate Spade as a customer for its AI shopping technology.
